## Validation Checklist

<!-- Select every completed item. -->

* [ ] I reviewed the existing issues and roadmap.
* [ ] The change is focused and does not include unrelated modifications.
* [ ] I added or updated tests for behavioral changes.
* [ ] The complete test suite passes locally.
* [ ] `python main.py` completes successfully when relevant.
* [ ] I preserved existing public behavior unless the change explicitly requires otherwise.
* [ ] I added clear validation and informative error messages where relevant.
* [ ] I avoided unnecessary dependencies and duplicated calculation logic.
* [ ] I updated the README or other documentation when public behavior changed.
* [ ] I did not commit generated files from `outputs/`.
* [ ] I did not commit credentials, private data or sensitive genomic information.
* [ ] I considered the effect of the change on interpretability and reproducibility.
* [ ] I did not introduce unsupported biological, medical or clinical claims.
